title: The Coward at the Crossroads
target: decide whether to hire the deserter loitering outside the chapel

contributions.line: Veska's sharp eyes catch the flicker of nervousness behind the deserter’s eyes, confirming her suspicion of deceit.
Imogen leans in, her charming tone gently probing the true reason he ran, hoping to find a shred of honesty buried beneath his fear.

outcomeNarrative: Veska's meticulous scrutiny and Imogen's empathetic persuasion reveal the deserter's guilt and desperation, convincing the party to dismiss him without risk.
